x-enumeration-literals.name: Account-Linked Debit Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Allows transactions to be directly linked to a specific account, with debits reducing the account balance immediately.

Comment:
Example:
Debit card purchases linked to a current account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cash Withdrawal Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Allows cash to be withdrawn from ATMs or teller machines

Comment:
Example:
$500 daily ATM withdrawal limit.

x-enumeration-literals.name: POS Debit Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Point-of-Sale (POS) Debit Feature: Allows funds to be debited during in-store or online purchases.

Comment:
Example:
Using a debit card to pay at a retail store or e-commerce platform.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Online Debit Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Enables funds to be debited via internet or mobile banking channels.

Comment:
Example:
Bill payment, peer-to-peer transfers, or e-wallet top-ups.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Recurring Debit Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Recurring / Scheduled Debit Feature: Allows automatic debits at predefined intervals for recurring obligations.

Comment:
Example:
Monthly utility bill or loan repayment automatically debited.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Overdraft Debit Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Overdraft / Credit-Linked Debit Feature: Allows debit transactions to occur even when account balance is insufficient, using an overdraft or linked credit facility.

Comment:
Example:
Debit card purchase that exceeds current balance but draws on overdraft protection.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tiered Debit Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Debit access varies based on account type, customer segment, or product tier.

Comment:
Example:
Premium customers have higher daily debit limits than standard account holders.
